title: Benin launches a new National Cybersecurity Strategy - ITU
description: ITU news item on Benin's national cybersecurity strategy. No mention of post-quantum or quantum-safe cryptography. International body (ITU), not a domestic Benin issuer.

title: Information Systems and Digital Agency (Benin) - Wikipedia
description: Encyclopedia entry describing ASIN, the agency formed in 2022 by merging ADN, ASSI, ANSSI-Benin and ABSUCEP. Reference source, not institutional or PQC-explicit.

title: Benin - National Cyber Security Index (NCSI) - e-Governance Academy
description: NCSI country profile for Benin. Foreign NGO/index, not a domestic Benin issuer; no PQC content.

title: Agence des Systemes d'Information et du Numerique (ASIN) - official site
description: Official homepage of Benin's national digital and information systems agency (ASIN). Domestic official body but no post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography content surfaced.

title: Agence des systemes d'information et du numerique (Benin) - Wikipedia FR
description: French Wikipedia entry on ASIN. Reference source, not institutional or PQC-explicit.

title: Securite numerique : le Benin entame une actualisation de sa strategie nationale - Portail du Numerique Benin
description: Official Benin government digital portal news on updating the national digital security strategy (SNSN). Domestic official source but does not mention post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography.

title: Stratégie Nationale de Sécurité Numérique (SNSN) - signed by ANSSI-Benin (hosted on ITU)
description: Benin's National Digital Security Strategy signed by ANSSI-Benin (hosted in ITU's national strategies repository). General cybersecurity strategy; no explicit mention of post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography surfaced in searches.

title: Le Benin actualise sa strategie nationale de securite numerique - Africa Cybersecurity Magazine
description: Journalism on the SNSN update. Media outlet, not a domestic institution; no PQC content.

title: Politique de Securite des Systemes d'Information de l'Etat - Portail du Numerique Benin
description: Official Benin portal news on the State Information Systems Security Policy (decree N 2021-550). Domestic official source but no post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography mention.

title: 1 Un cyberespace securise et attrayant pour une economie numerique florissante - ASIN (download)
description: ASIN-hosted strategy document on a secure cyberspace. Domestic official source but no explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography content surfaced.

title: Publications | Agence des Systemes d'Information et du Numerique - ASIN
description: ASIN publications page. Domestic official body; no post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography publication surfaced.

title: Autorite de Regulation des Communications Electroniques et de la Poste (Benin) - Wikipedia
description: Entry on Benin's telecom regulator (ARCEP Benin). Reference source; no PQC content and no domestic PQC regulatory action found.
